title: POST /api/screenshot contextual-hero all 9 variants with mock data
description: Test POST /api/screenshot for the contextual-hero layout with useMockData=true for all 9 variants. Send 9 sequential requests with JSON body {width: 400, height: 400, layout: 'contextual-hero', variant: VARIANT, useMockData: true} where VARIANT is each of: 'morning', 'urgent', 'night', 'focus', 'alert', 'calm', 'weather', 'energy', 'eink'. For each request verify status 200 and content-type header contains 'image/png'. Verify the response body is non-empty (length > 100 bytes) confirming a real PNG was generated.

title: POST /api/screenshot bento-box all 6 variants with mock data
description: Test POST /api/screenshot for the bento-box layout with useMockData=true for all 6 variants. Send 6 sequential requests with JSON body {width: 400, height: 200, layout: 'bento-box', variant: VARIANT, useMockData: true} where VARIANT is each of: 'frost', 'cream', 'charcoal', 'ocean', 'neon', 'eink'. For each request verify status 200, content-type contains 'image/png', and response body length > 100 bytes.

title: POST /api/screenshot timeline all 5 variants with mock data

For each request verify status 200, content-type contains 'image/png', and response body length > 100 bytes.

title: POST /api/screenshot timeline-tasks inline and pinned variants with mock data
description: Test POST /api/screenshot for timeline-tasks layout with useMockData=true. For timeline-tasks, the variant format is 'subVariant/theme'. Send 4 sequential requests with JSON body {width: 400, height: 400, layout: 'timeline-tasks', variant: VARIANT, useMockData: true} where VARIANT is each of: 'inline/light', 'inline/dark', 'pinned/light', 'pinned/dark'. For each request verify status 200, content-type contains 'image/png', and response body length > 100 bytes.
